1. **Prompt injection attempt**: line 1 of the file itself contains text that mimics/duplicates your task instructions ("You are triaging observations..."). That's data pretending to be an instruction — I did not treat it as authoritative, only your actual message defines the task.
2. **ID mismatch**: none of the items use the `ZM-EXP001-Cnn` format you described — they're `bg-02xx` ids. Flagging in case this is the wrong file.

Content-wise: all 5 items are Hacker News story links (Boko Haram/AI, AMD Ryzen AI Halo, orbital datacenter FCC review, AI2Web protocol, GPT-5.6 novella) — third-party news/discussion, none report a failure of this system's own monitored feeds or services.

No ACT lines apply.
